LanguageData.ME_NewExperimentDesc: Design an experiment by choosing three reagents. A doctor will combine them at this bench. The right combination produces an experimental compound; the wrong one wastes materials.
LanguageData.ME_PickHint: Choose exactly three reagents. Repeats are allowed.
LanguageData.ME_Unidentified: Unidentified experimental compound. Administer it to learn what it does.
LanguageData.ME_AdverseReactionMsg: {0} reacted badly to {1}. Their body is incompatible with it.
LanguageData.ME_ExperimentSuccess: The experiment produced a new compound.
LanguageData.ME_ExperimentFail: The experiment failed. Salvaged {0} of 3 reagents.
LanguageData.ME_SelectCompoundDesc: Choose which discovered toxic compound this unit vents at hostiles.
LanguageData.ME_Setting_Incompat: Incompatibility chance per patient per compound: {0}
LanguageData.ME_Setting_AutoTake: Colonists may take unidentified compounds from drug policies
LanguageData.ME_Setting_AutoTake_Desc: Off by default, so unidentified compounds are only administered deliberately.
LanguageData.ME_Setting_PrisonerExp: Enable marking prisoners for automatic experimentation
LanguageData.ME_Setting_FriendlyFire: Dispersal units affect everyone in the cloud
LanguageData.ME_Setting_FriendlyFire_Desc: Chemicals do not discriminate. Turn off to spare your own pawns.
